title: Psychilis krugii
taxonomy: Psychilis krugii is classified as a species of orchid in the genus Psychilis, which belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This genus is native to the Caribbean and is characterized by its unique flowers and growth habits. Psychilis krugii is a terrestrial orchid, meaning it grows on the ground, and is found in tropical and subtropical regions. The classification of Psychilis krugii is further detailed at the species level, where it is designated as Psychilis krugii. At the kingdom level, it is classified as a member of the kingdom Plantae.
